meta.phase-name: Public quote estimator intake and pricing calibration

highlights.item: Phase 14 recalibrates the public estimator so house washes now use wall-count pricing, stronger review notes, and explicit manual-review lanes for taller or more complex jobs.
The homepage `/#instant-quote` flow now supports optional job-photo intake with a shared validation contract: up to 5 image files, 8MB each, while preserving the fast no-image submission path.
Estimator attachments now persist in a dedicated admin-only Payload upload collection linked to the originating `form-submissions` record and ready for later quote linkage.
The public route accepts JSON for no-image requests and multipart uploads only when images are selected, so the default lane stays lightweight while photo review still fits in the same request.
Focused verification now covers pricing math, attachment validation, route persistence behavior, and browser checks for both JSON and multipart homepage submissions.
Phase 14 also closes the follow-on documentation tasks for method-training artifacts, reusable intake metadata, and the composer/copilot docking requirement.

verification.command: npm.cmd exec eslint src/app/api/lead-forms/instant-quote/route.ts src/components/InstantQuoteSection.tsx src/lib/forms/api.ts tests/int/app/instant-quote-route.int.spec.ts tests/int/lib/forms/instant-quote-request.int.spec.ts tests/int/lib/forms/instant-quote-attachments.int.spec.ts tests/e2e/frontend.e2e.spec.ts

Manual `next dev --hostname localhost --port 3110` plus `npm.cmd exec -- playwright test tests/e2e/frontend.e2e.spec.ts --grep "instant quote" --config=playwright.local.config.ts` with `PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3110`

next.item: Phase `15` is also complete and should be marked complete in the roadmap.
The next implementation stream is phase `16`: mirrored preview/Structure selection, hover actions, inline editing, responsive preview controls, and publish workflow refinement.
